name: 5520 Series Universal Switches
description: High-performance universal edge and aggregation switches with dual-persona OS, modular uplinks, hot-swap redundant PSU/fans, and 200 Gbps stacking — built for the next-generation digital enterprise.

name: 5420 Series Universal Edge Switches
description: Stackable universal edge switches with dual-persona OS support (Switch Engine or Fabric Engine), multi-gigabit connectivity, and flexible cloud or on-box management for enterprise wiring-closet deployments.

name: 5720 Series Universal Switches
description: High-performance universal edge and aggregation switches with multi-gigabit connectivity (100Mb–10Gb), dual-persona OS, MACsec encryption, 400Gbps stacking, hot-swap redundant PSU/fans, and Extreme Platform ONE integration for zero-trust micro-segmentation.

name: 5320 Series Universal Edge Switches
description: High-performance stackable multi-gig edge switches for enterprise wired access. Available in 16, 24, and 48-port configurations with dual-persona OS, MACsec encryption, 30W PoE, and Extreme Platform ONE integration for automated provisioning and zero-trust security.

specs.features: ZTP, Instant Port, Instant Stack, AI troubleshooting

name: 5120 Series Universal Switches
description: Stackable 10Gb universal edge/aggregation switches for campus and data center deployments. Supports dual-persona OS, hot-swap redundant PSU/fans, MACsec 256-bit encryption, zero-touch provisioning, and Extreme Platform ONE integration.

specs.features: ZTP, Instant Port, Instant Stack, hot-swap PSU/fans

name: ExtremeWireless AP5010
description: Wi-Fi 6E tri-radio indoor access point with world SKU (geo-location auto-regulatory), 4x4:4 MIMO across all three bands, up to 10 Gbps aggregate throughput, dedicated tri-frequency security sensor, stateful L2-L7 DPI firewall, and ZTNA policy enforcement.

specs.apRadioFeature: Tri-radio 4x4:4 MIMO (2.4GHz + 5GHz + 6GHz), 10 Gbps aggregate, 87 total channels, CCF, multi-band filter, BLE & iBeacon, world SKU
specs.operationModes: Mode 1: 2.4GHz / 5GHz / 6GHz data radios | Mode 2: 5GHz / 6GHz data + dedicated tri-frequency sensor

name: ExtremeCloud IQ (XIQ)
description: Core component of Extreme's '1 Cloud, 1 Network' strategy. ML-powered cloud management platform delivering unified visibility, anomaly detection, real-time remediation, and business insights across APs, switches, and SD-WAN infrastructure.

specs.coverage: Wireless APs, switches, SD-WAN, iOS & Android
specs.ai: ML-based anomaly detection, explainable algorithms, millions of data points analyzed
specs.visibility: Real-time & historical client/device health, application usage monitoring, compliance reporting
specs.integratedApps: ExtremeGuest, Extreme AirDefense (24/7 WIPS), ExtremeLocation (Wi-Fi & BLE)
specs.licenseTiers: CoPilot (anomaly detection & UX assurance) / Pilot (full management + guest, WIPS, location)

name: ExtremeCloud IQ Site Engine
description: Cloud-linked or on-premises network management unifying multi-vendor environments. Provides end-to-end automation, DPI analytics, role-based NAC, fabric management, and migration paths for legacy and third-party devices.

specs.deployment: Cloud-linked, on-premises, or air-gapped (no internet); Universal License model
specs.coverage: Extreme, Cisco, Juniper, HPE Aruba, Dell, Nokia, Allied Telesis, Zyxel, Huawei
specs.automation: ZTP+, event-triggered workflows (thresholds, syslog, API), Python scripting, cross-domain automation
specs.analytics: DPI application telemetry, topology visualization (fabric/VLAN/LAG/MLAG), root cause analysis
specs.security: Role-based NAC, BYOD, guest access, IoT device control, data sovereignty (air-gapped mode)
specs.fabric: Automated OS persona switching (Switch Engine ↔ Fabric Engine), IS-IS area & fabric path visualization

name: Extreme Platform ONE
description: All-in-one platform unifying networking, security, and AI. Conversational, multimodal, and agentic AI reduce manual effort by up to 90%, transforming complex workflows into single-click operations across the entire network and security stack.

specs.deployment: SaaS (Cloud), zero-touch fabric deployment, inclusive subscription model
specs.ai: Conversational AI, multimodal AI, agentic AI — up to 90% manual effort reduction
specs.automation: End-to-end network & security automation, procurement & compliance workflows, device lifecycle management
specs.security: Pre-integrated zero trust (Universal ZTNA), enhanced Wi-Fi security, role-based access controls, Extreme Fabric visualization
specs.visibility: Multi-domain, multi-layer network views, inventory & subscription tracking, contract management
specs.recognition: IDC MarketScape Leader — Enterprise Wireless LAN 2025

name: ExtremeControl
description: Network access control (NAC) solution within ExtremeCloud IQ Site Engine. Provides role-based access control for all device types, secure BYOD & guest onboarding, dedicated IoT security, and context-aware policy enforcement from edge to data center.

specs.deployment: Part of ExtremeCloud IQ Site Engine (on-premises or cloud-linked)
specs.accessControl: Role-based NAC for all device types incl. third-party, BYOD, guest, IoT
specs.policyControl: Context-aware identity matching (user, time, location, vulnerability, access type), VLAN/ACL/QoS, downloadable & dynamic ACLs
specs.integration: NGFWs, SIEM, CMDB, EMM/MDM (VMware Workspace ONE, Citrix, MobileIron), internet security tools
specs.monitoring: Customizable alerts & reports, passive policy testing, unified dashboard, endpoint health status
specs.security: Unauthorized user & compromised endpoint prevention, orchestrated endpoint isolation & remediation

name: ExtremeRouting SLX 9640
description: High-performance data center and service provider router with 100G/400G interfaces.

name: ExtremeCloud IQ Controller
description: On-premises or cloud-linked wireless LAN controller managing up to 20,000 wired and wireless devices. Provides centralized management, NAC, routing, location analytics, and IoT support for campus and high-density deployments.

specs.deployment: On-premises controller or optional cloud-linked integration with ExtremeCloud IQ
specs.capacity: Up to 20,000 wired & wireless devices (APs, switches, IoT)
specs.management: Unified wired & wireless management, workbench tools, detailed reporting across 32 app categories
specs.security: NAC, policy & access control, certified integrations with Extreme security applications
specs.locationAnalytics: Visitor footfall analysis, density mapping, traffic flow, RFQI Wi-Fi visualization, BLE asset tracking
specs.integration: Open APIs for third-party app integration, optional ExtremeCloud IQ cloud management

name: ExtremeAnalytics
description: Network traffic analytics platform delivering real-time application visibility, user behavior intelligence, shadow IT detection, and security forensics. Correlates user, device, and application data from Extreme switches and APs with cloud integrations for GCP, AWS, and Azure.

specs.deployment: On-premises (optional Traffic Sensor appliance); integrates with XIQ Site Engine
specs.businessIntelligence: App usage tracking, real-time flow visibility, ROI analysis, bandwidth consumption reports
specs.security: Shadow IT detection, security forensics, packet capture, unauthorized app & device visibility
specs.analytics: Correlates user/device/app telemetry from Extreme switches (Universal Platform, VSP, Summit, ERS, SLX) & APs via XIQ Controllers

name: 4000 Series Universal Edge Switches
description: Layer 2 universal access switches for cost-effective Ethernet connectivity in campus, branch, and distributed site deployments. Features dual-persona OS (EXOS or VOSS), zero-touch provisioning, and Extreme Platform ONE integration for automated provisioning and zero-trust security policies.

specs.features: Extreme Fabric, ZTP, Instant Port automation

name: 7520 Series Universal Switches
description: 1U universal aggregation and core switches with high-density 10G/25G/100G ports, dual-persona OS, 400Gbps stacking, MACsec (select models), integrated application hosting, and Extreme Platform ONE for zero-trust segmentation.

specs.features: ZTP, Instant Port, Instant Secure Port, Instant Stack, app hosting

name: 7720 Series Universal Switches
description: 1U fixed-form universal aggregation and core switch with 32x 40G/100G QSFP28 ports, dual-persona OS, 400Gbps stacking, sub-second fabric convergence, and integrated application hosting for zero-trust enterprise networks.

specs.features: ZTP, Instant Port, Instant Stack, app hosting

name: ExtremeWireless AP4020
description: Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be) indoor access point with 2x2:2 quad-radio design, dedicated security sensor, Multi-Link Operations (MLO), AI-driven troubleshooting, and Universal ZTNA policy enforcement for seamless IT & OT wireless deployments.

specs.apRadioFeature: 2x2:2 quad radio, MLO, dedicated tri-frequency security sensor, optional dual 5GHz, cellular coexistence filter

name: ExtremeWireless AP5020
description: Flagship Wi-Fi 7 indoor access point with 5-radio design, up to 20 Gbps aggregate throughput, dual IoT radios, tri-frequency security sensor, stateful L2-L7 DPI firewall, ZTNA policy enforcement, and 6 configurable operational modes for high-density enterprise deployments.

specs.apRadioFeature: 5-radio design: 4x4:4 MIMO (2.4GHz + 5GHz + 6GHz) + dual IoT radio + tri-frequency sensor with CCF, up to 20 Gbps aggregate, BLE & Apple iBeacon
specs.poe: 802.3bt (fully functional), built-in PoE failover, PSE (PoE Out) support

name: ExtremeWireless AP4000
description: Wi-Fi 6E tri-radio indoor access point with 2x2:2 MIMO across 2.4/5/6 GHz, up to 3.9 Gbps aggregate throughput, cellular coexistence filter, integrated BLE, and WPA3 security for cloud or on-premises managed deployments.

specs.apRadioFeature: Tri-radio 2x2:2 MIMO (2.4GHz + 5GHz + 6GHz), integrated BLE, cellular coexistence filter (CCF), multi-band filter
specs.operationModes: Data Mode: all 3 radios as data | Sensor Mode: 2 data radios + 1 dedicated tri-frequency security sensor

name: ExtremeWireless AP5050U/D
description: Wi-Fi 6E tri-radio IP67-rated outdoor access point engineered for stadiums and harsh environments. Official Wi-Fi provider for NFL and MLB. Features 4x4:4 MIMO across all three bands, software-selectable antennas, CCF, BLE, and ZTNA policy enforcement.

specs.apRadioFeature: Tri-radio 4x4:4 MIMO (2.4GHz + 5GHz + 6GHz), software-selectable antennas, CCF, multi-band filter, integrated BLE
specs.operationModes: Mode 1: 2.4GHz / 5GHz / 6GHz data radios | Mode 2: 5GHz / 6GHz data + dedicated tri-frequency sensor
specs.HarshEnvironments: IP67 outdoor-rated, -40°C to +60°C, stadium-grade (NFL & MLB certified venue)

name: ExtremeWireless AP4060
description: Wi-Fi 7 weatherized outdoor access point with quad-radio 2x2:2 design, MLO, dedicated security sensor, 320 MHz channels with 4K-QAM, IP67 rating, and operation from -40°C to +60°C for hurricane-force wind environments.

specs.apRadioFeature: Quad-radio 2x2:2, MLO, dedicated tri-frequency security sensor, optional dual 5GHz, 320MHz channels, 4K-QAM, CCF
specs.operationModes: Mode 1: 2.4GHz / 5GHz / 6GHz data + sensor | Mode 2: 2.4GHz / dual 5GHz + sensor
specs.HarshEnvironments: IP67 weatherized, -40°C to +60°C, hurricane-force wind rated

name: 7830 Series Universal Switches
description: Next-generation 2RU modular core switch with 32x100G and 8x400G fixed ports, 2 VIM expansion slots, MACsec-ready interfaces, Extreme Fabric sub-second convergence, and Extreme Platform ONE for automated macro/micro-segmentation in enterprise and data center networks.

specs.fabric: Extreme Fabric — sub-second convergence, stealth topology
specs.features: Extreme Platform ONE, ZTP, modular VIM, optimized power & cooling

name: ExtremeWireless AP3000/X
description: Wi-Fi 6E dual-radio indoor access point with integrated or external antenna options, world SKU, 4.8 Gbps aggregate throughput, CCF, BLE, ZTNA policy enforcement, and 802.3af PoE support for budget-conscious enterprise deployments.

specs.apRadioFeature: Dual-radio 2x2:2 (Radio 1: 2.4/5GHz, Radio 2: 5/6GHz), 4.8 Gbps aggregate, CCF, BLE & iBeacon, world SKU, integrated or external antenna options
specs.operationModes: Mode 1: 2.4GHz / 5GHz data radios | Mode 2: 5GHz / 6GHz data radios
